title: quoya verbascina
intro: Quoya verbascina, also known as Verbascum thapsus, is a perennial plant native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa, belonging to the Scrophulariaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Quoya verbascina include relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as soothing skin irritations and wounds. Quoya verbascina is often prepared into herbal remedies like infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, and is also used in salves and ointments for topical application.
